DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PETITIONER DAPHNE BRAUN ROSENFLED'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY AND TO DENY COURT APPOINTED FORENSIC ACCOUNTANT IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. THE MOTION IS NOT IN THE PROPER DEPARTMENT AS IT SEEKS TO SET ASIDE THE ORDER APPOINTING A FORENSIC ACCOUNTANT MADE BY COMM. SLABACH. THE MOTION IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FURTHER REASON THAT IT WAS NOT PROPERLY SERVED AS IT DID NOT INCLUDE THE DATE AND TIME FOR HEARING. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
